must_detect.matched_text: Conditional Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Subscription and Partial Acquisition by Meranti Capital Sdn Bhd into Pemadu Tech Berhad (Company No.: 2026-0000000-Z), a company listed on the Main Board of Bursa Kencana.

Transaction: Subscription of redeemable convertible preference shares (RCPS) and acquisition of up to 19.9% of GreenIkat Analytics Sdn Bhd (Reg. No.: 7777777-P), a subsidiary of Pemadu Tech Berhad; proposed issuance code PTB-RCPS-XX01 (internal placeholder only).
Financing: Acquisition consideration may be supported by a standby facility from Kuda Biru Bank Berhad using the HarmonyXP Loan Suite; no security interest over consumer data will be taken.

Conditional Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Subscription and Partial Acquisition by Meranti Capital Sdn Bhd into Pemadu Tech Berhad (Company No.: 2026-0000000-Z), a company listed on the Main Board of Bursa Kencana.
Transaction: Subscription of redeemable convertible preference shares (RCPS) and acquisition of up to 19.9% of GreenIkat Analytics Sdn Bhd (Reg. No.: 7777777-P), a subsidiary of Pemadu Tech Berhad; proposed issuance code PTB-RCPS-XX01 (internal placeholder only).
Pricing: RCPS issue price to be determined by a volume-weighted average price formula over the 5 market days preceding public announcement on the Exchange; no market-sensitive amounts are set in this document.
Conditions Precedent: (i) approval of Pemadu Tech Berhad’s shareholders at EGM, (ii) clearance from the Exchange under its Main Market listing rules, and (iii) non-objection under applicable Malaysian securities laws including the CMSA.
Regulatory and MNPI: Parties acknowledge restrictions on dealing while in possession of MNPI; information shared for this transaction shall be limited to public or cleansing materials suitable for Bursa Kencana announcement.
PDPA and Data Handling: Only aggregated and de-identified HR and customer data will be made available to Investor; no personal files or direct identifiers will be transferred as part of due diligence.
Key Person Undertaking: The Company notes that Employee 0047 (a designated key person) has disclosed a chronic health condition; consent for limited processing is obtained under PDPA solely for key-man insurance eligibility and no underlying medical records will be shared with Investor.
Financing: Acquisition consideration may be supported by a standby facility from Kuda Biru Bank Berhad using the HarmonyXP Loan Suite; no security interest over consumer data will be taken.
Security Package: Pledge over RCPS and intra-group share charges only; no assignment of receivables from government contracts and no fixed charge over trademarks of the CloudSparrow Platform.
Announcements: All announcements shall be coordinated via the Company Secretary and made simultaneously on the Exchange and the Company website; IR mailbox: investorrelations@pemadutech.example.
Exclusivity and No-Shop: 60-day exclusivity for the RCPS subscription; carve-outs for responses to unsolicited approaches that are publicly announced first.
Representations: The Company confirms that any references to “Rainbow Cohesion Policy” and “Wellness for All” programme are generic policy names, do not identify any individual, and are not material to valuation.
Public/Non-Material Items: Mentions of the Tiger Strikers supporters’ club, the Meranti City pilot lab, or the “Sail Past the Monsoon Window” internal project tagline are marketing-only and not indicative of revenue.
Integration: No workforce realignment or product discontinuation is contemplated upon completion; standard transitional services will be agreed on arm’s length terms.
Governing Law and Disputes: This term sheet is governed by the laws of Malaysia; disputes to be resolved by arbitration seated in Putra Jaya Park under the Kencana Arbitration Rules (
